name: Herbed Veal Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the veal chops on a platter.
2. Combine the olive oil, herbs (basil, rosemary, thyme), and lemon rind in a bowl.
3. Brush the mixture onto the veal chops.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Leave the seasoned chops to marinate at room temperature for 1 hour, or refrigerate for up to 12 hours.
6. Grill the veal chops for 4 to 6 minutes per side on high heat, depending on the thickness of the chops. They should be slightly pink when cooked.
7. Remove from grill and serve.
Serves 6.
Note: Use Veal rib chops or Veal loin chops or Pork chops.
